mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seed_data (seed_key, summary_json, created_at) VALUES (#{seedKey}, #{summaryJson}, NOW(3)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE summary_json = VALUES(summary_json), created_at = VALUES(created_at)

INSERT INTO bangumi_recommendations ( bangumi_id, title, title_cn, cover_url, score, chtholly_review, tags_json, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{bangumiId}, #{title}, #{titleCn}, #{coverUrl}, #{score}, #{chthollyReview}, #{tagsJson}, #{createdAt}, #{createdAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), title_cn = VALUES(title_cn), cover_url = VALUES(cover_url), score = VALUES(score), chtholly_review = VALUES(chtholly_review), tags_json = VALUES(tags_json), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO users ( id, email, nickname, avatar, bio, handle, gender, birthday, school, tags_json, role, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{avatar}, #{bio}, #{handle}, #{gender}, #{birthday}, #{school}, #{tagsJson}, 'USER', #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE nickname = VALUES(nickname), avatar = VALUES(avatar), bio = VALUES(bio), gender = VALUES(gender), birthday = VALUES(birthday), school = VALUES(school), tags_json = VALUES(tags_json), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO posts ( id, creator_id, title, slug, description, content_url, content_object_key, content_size, content_sha256, tags, img_urls, status, type, visible, is_top, create_time, update_time, publish_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{creatorId}, #{title}, #{slug}, #{description}, #{contentUrl}, #{contentObjectKey}, #{contentSize}, #{contentSha256}, #{tagsJson}, #{imgUrlsJson}, 'published', 'image_text', 'public', 0, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{publishTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = VALUES(title), description = VALUES(description), content_url = VALUES(content_url), content_object_key = VALUES(content_object_key), content_size = VALUES(content_size), content_sha256 = VALUES(content_sha256), tags = VALUES(tags), img_urls = VALUES(img_urls), status = VALUES(status), visible = VALUES(visible), update_time = VALUES(update_time), publish_time = VALUES(publish_time)
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM posts WHERE slug = #{slug} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM users WHERE handle = #{handle} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, content, is_chtholly, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{postId}, NULL, #{userId}, #{content}, 0, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE content = VALUES(content), updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
INSERT INTO comments ( id, post_id, parent_id, user_id, content, is_chtholly, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{postId}, #{parentId}, #{userId}, #{content}, 0, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )

INSERT INTO following (id, from_user_id, to_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{fromUserId}, #{toUserId}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rel_status = 1, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)

INSERT INTO follower (id, to_user_id, from_user_id, rel_status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{toUserId}, #{fromUserId}, 1, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE rel_status = 1, updated_at = VALUES(updated_at)
